expectations.text: Recognizes this is a recurring failure, not a first-time observation
expectations.evidence: Response explicitly identifies this as a resolved entry that keeps coming back: 'resolved in session 5... fix didn't hold... recurred in sessions 7 and 8. This is the escalation signal /foo watches for.'

expectations.text: Proposes escalation beyond the original fix
expectations.evidence: Escalated from a soft directive (paragraph of conventions) to a named discipline with four numbered, imperative, verifiable rules. Also identifies the further escalation path (tooling) if the discipline doesn't hold.

expectations.text: Updates FOO_2 in FEEDBACK_FOO.md with escalation context
expectations.evidence: FOO_2 has new '[escalated]' status line: 'Simple directive didn't stick. Escalating to a named discipline with enforceable rules (session 9). See Review Interaction Discipline in CLAUDE.md.'

expectations.text: Suggests concrete next steps (stronger wording, discipline, or tooling)
expectations.evidence: Created Review Interaction Discipline in CLAUDE.md with 4 concrete rules. Response also identifies tooling (prompt template) as the next escalation if discipline doesn't hold.
